name: JengaBench
description: A deterministic visual benchmark for spatial reasoning and physical planning in an unstable Jenga tower.

binding_vow.description: Inspect rendered JengaBench camera views and return one structured ChangeViewpoint or Push action per turn.

observation_space.description: A PNG render from the current persistent camera viewpoint.

action_space.description: JSON action: ChangeViewpoint with azimuth, pitch, distance_cm; or Push with layer, positional color, axial face, 3x3 contact, and Gentle/Firm/Hard intensity.

reward.description: Valid camera changes and pushes score 0 in this slice, invalid actions score -0.5, and ten consecutive viewpoints terminate with -10.
